title: Mystical Trees
description: Adds Resourceful Trees for more than 15+ vanilla & modded materials! (HEAVY BETA RIGHT NOW)
body:
## 🌳 Mystical Trees
Mystical Trees brings you a plethora of Trees that allows you to grow resources not just Valueables but also Blocks and Mob Drops too!



## ✅ Features:
- 15+ Trees (At the moment!) of resources
- Compatbility with Productive Metalworks
- Ether System



## ❌ Not Included:(possible future features)
- Jade Integration
- Block to convert item? to ether in the chunk 
- Custom Crafting/Processing System
- Integration to other Mods
- Possible Machines/Automation Blocks



## ⚙️ Config System: (W.I.P.)
 


## 👁️ Jade Integration (W.I.P.)

- Will show how much Ether Sapling needs to grow
- Will show progress of growth by showing current ether
